title: Comforting Japanese Beef Donburi
description: A hearty Japanese dish featuring tender beef, flavorful mustard seeds, and a balance of earthy and juicy elements, making it a perfect comfort food for any time of day, and its ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly properties promote energy and vitality.

ingredients.name: beef strips
ingredients.notes: rested meat, sliced into thin strips

instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mustard seeds and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sake, mirin, and soy sauce, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Prepare the Japanese rice according to the package instructions.
To assemble the donburi, place a scoop of rice in a bowl, then add the beef and sauce mixture on top.
Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
